ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( IP_BankAccountName__c !=Null && NOT($Profile.Name == 'Inquiry Profile') && NOT($Profile.Name == 'User Portal'), IF(IP_AccountNumber__c==Null|| IP_SortCode__c ==Null ||NOT(REGEX(IP_AccountNumber__c, "[0-9]{8}"))||NOT(REGEX(IP_SortCode__c, "[0-9]{6}")),True,False) ,False)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Account number and sort code can not be null. If filled, Account number must be 8 digit numeric and Sort code must be 6 digit numeric.
